'''√s-r-sh''' ('''kasarash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:macrodose|macrodose]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-r-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:macrodose|macrodose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √s-r-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kasarash
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thisarash || jisarash || shisarash || kisarash
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthusarash || jujusarash || shushusarash || kukusarash
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thusarash || jusarash || shusarash || kusarash
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thusarash || jusarash || shusarash || kusarash
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thesarash || jesarash || shesarash || kesarash
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothosarash || jojosarash || shoshosarash || kokosarash
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thosarash || josarash || shosarash || kosarash
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thosarash || josarash || shosarash || kosarash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || sarash || sarash || sarash || sarash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || sarash || sarash || sarash || sarash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || sarash || sarash || sarash || sarash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || sarash || sarash || sarash || sarash
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæsarash || jæsarash || shæsarash || kæsarash
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathasarash || jajasarash || shashasarash || kakasarash
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thasarash || jasarash || shasarash || kasarash
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thasarash || jasarash || shasarash || kasarash
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shasarash
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshasarash
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishasarash
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shasarashnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshasarashnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishasarashnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shasarashshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshasarashnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishasarashshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shasarashro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshasarashnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishasarashro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shasarashmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshasarashnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishasarashmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shasarashsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshasarashnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishasarashsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shasarashng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshasarashnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishasarashng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shasarashya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshasarashnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishasarashya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shasarashyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshasarashnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishasarashyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shasarashnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshasarashnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishasarashnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shasarashnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasarashnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasarashnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shasarashnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshasarashnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasarashnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shasarashshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshasarashnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishasarashshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shasarashshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasarashnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasarashshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shasarashshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshasarashnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasarashshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shasarashronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshasarashnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishasarashronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shasarashroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshasarashnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishasarashroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shasarashromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshasarashnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasarashromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shasarashmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshasarashnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishasarashmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shasarashmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshasarashnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishasarashmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shasarashmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasarashnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasarashmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
